Where is the solenoid located on a riding lawn mower? The solenoid, typically located near the starter motor, is easily found by tracing the red cable from the battery's positive terminal directly to the solenoid, where the other end of the cable is attached. Package includes: 1pcs 435-151 Solenoid Starter Relay 2pcs Terminal Blocks
